examples: Do not confuse ever the tangential acceleration, which is along the circumference, with centripetal acceleration.
Too much time was spent discussing tangential issues.
He closed his office on the street tangential to the courthouse square and walked the two blocks to his house..
Her narrative, though sometimes tangential and disjointed, rattles enjoyably through a lurid and restless landscape.
In short, the financial fallout would have been substantial for many tangential entities and organizations.
